content.json:
# StealthTalk - Anomalous Auth Monitor

Real-time detection and analysis dashboard for **`StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL`** events (DCR: `StealthTalk-Sentinel-DCR`).

| Severity | Analytics Rule | Trigger condition | Schedule |
|---|---|---|---|
| High | `LoginOutsideWorkZone` | Country **or** city mismatch | Every 15 min / lookback 1 h |
| High | `PasswordBruteForce` | >= 9 consecutive failed attempts | Every 15 min / lookback 5 h |
| Medium | `MultiNewDevicesRegistration` | >= 2 distinct new device IDs / 24 h | Every 30 min / lookback 24 h |
| Low | `AfterHoursWork` | Systematic off-hours pattern on 2+ days | Every 1 h / lookback 48 h |

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| summarize
 Total = count(),
 HighSev = countif(Severity == 'High'),
 MedSev = countif(Severity == 'Medium'),
 LowSev = countif(Severity == 'Low'),
 AffectedUsers = dcount(UserId)
| mv-expand Stats = pack_array(
 bag_pack('Metric', ' Total Events', 'Value', Total),
 bag_pack('Metric', ' High Severity', 'Value', HighSev),
 bag_pack('Metric', ' Medium Severity', 'Value', MedSev),
 bag_pack('Metric', ' Low Severity', 'Value', LowSev),
 bag_pack('Metric', ' Users Affected', 'Value', AffectedUsers)
 )
| project
 Metric = tostring(Stats.Metric),
 Value = toint(Stats.Value)
content.title: Executive Summary

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where Severity in ({Severity})
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), EventType
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Events Timeline - by type (1 h bins)

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where Severity in ({Severity})
| summarize Count = count() by EventType
| extend Label = case(
 EventType == 'OffHoursLogin', ' Off-Hours Login',
 EventType == 'NewDeviceLogin', ' New Device Login',
 EventType == 'GeoAnomalyLogin',' Geo Anomaly',
 EventType == 'MultiFailLogin', ' Brute Force',
 EventType
 )
content.title: Event Type Distribution

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| extend RiskPts = case(Severity == 'High', 10, Severity == 'Medium', 5, 1)
| summarize
 TotalRisk = sum(RiskPts),
 TotalEvents = count(),
 HighEvents = countif(Severity == 'High'),
 MedEvents = countif(Severity == 'Medium'),
 LowEvents = countif(Severity == 'Low'),
 AnomalyTypes = make_set(EventType),
 LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
 by UserId
| extend RiskLevel = case(
 TotalRisk >= 50, ' Critical',
 TotalRisk >= 20, ' High',
 TotalRisk >= 10, ' Medium',
 ' Low'
 )
| extend AnomalyTypeCount = array_length(AnomalyTypes)
| order by TotalRisk desc
| take 20
content.title: User Risk Leaderboard (Top 20)

content.json:
## Multi-Vector Correlation

Users with **2 or more** anomaly types simultaneously - highest investigation priority.

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| summarize
 EventTypes = make_set(EventType),
 EventCount = count(),
 HasOffHours = countif(EventType == 'OffHoursLogin') > 0,
 HasNewDevice = countif(EventType == 'NewDeviceLogin') > 0,
 HasGeoAnomaly = countif(EventType == 'GeoAnomalyLogin')> 0,
 HasBruteForce = countif(EventType == 'MultiFailLogin') > 0,
 TotalRisk = sum(case(Severity == 'High', 10, Severity == 'Medium', 5, 1)),
 FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
 LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
 by UserId
| extend AnomalyTypeCount = toint(HasOffHours) + toint(HasNewDevice) + toint(HasGeoAnomaly) + toint(HasBruteForce)
| where AnomalyTypeCount >= 2
| order by AnomalyTypeCount desc, TotalRisk desc
content.title: Multi-Vector Attack Suspects

content.json:
---
## Off-Hours Activity

**Rule:** `AfterHoursWork` | **Severity:** Low | **Schedule:** every 1 h, lookback 48 h

Detects systematic logins outside working hours: weekends (`IsWeekend == true`) or deviation > 3 h (`DeviationMinutes >= 180`) across 2+ days with >= 3 attempts.

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'OffHoursLogin'
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 2h), IsWeekend
| extend Label = iff(IsWeekend, 'Weekend', 'After-Hours')
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Timeline - Off-Hours Login (2 h bins)

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'OffHoursLogin'
| extend HourOfDay = datetime_part('Hour', TimeGenerated)
| summarize Count = count() by HourOfDay
| order by HourOfDay asc
content.title: Login Hour Distribution

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'OffHoursLogin'
| summarize
 TotalLogins = count(),
 WeekendLogins = countif(IsWeekend == true),
 AfterHoursLogins = countif(IsWeekend == false),
 AvgDevMin = round(avg(DeviationMinutes), 0),
 MaxDevMin = max(DeviationMinutes),
 DistinctDays = dcount(format_datetime(TimeGenerated, 'yyyy-MM-dd')),
 Devices = make_set(DeviceId),
 LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
 by UserId
| extend MaxDevHours = round(toreal(MaxDevMin) / 60.0, 1)
| where TotalLogins >= 3 and DistinctDays >= 2
| order by TotalLogins desc
content.title: Top Users - Systematic Off-Hours (>= 3 logins, 2+ days)

content.json:
---
## New Device Anomalies

**Rule:** `MultiNewDevicesRegistration` | **Severity:** Medium | **Schedule:** every 30 min, lookback 24 h

Detects registration of >= 2 new devices within 24 h - possible account takeover or device farming.

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'NewDeviceLogin'
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 2h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: New Device Registrations - Timeline

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'NewDeviceLogin'
| summarize Count = count() by NewDeviceOS
| order by Count desc
content.title: New Device OS Distribution

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'NewDeviceLogin'
| summarize
 NewDeviceCount = dcount(NewDeviceId),
 NewDevices = make_set(NewDeviceId),
 OSList = make_set(NewDeviceOS),
 FirstRegistration = min(TimeGenerated),
 LastRegistration = max(TimeGenerated)
 by UserId
| where NewDeviceCount >= 2
| order by NewDeviceCount desc
content.title: Users with Multiple New Devices (>= 2) within Lookback

content.json:
---
## Geo Anomaly Logins

**Rule:** `LoginOutsideWorkZone` | **Severity:** High | **Schedule:** every 15 min, lookback 1 h

Every login from a country/city not matching the assigned geo zone creates an incident.

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'GeoAnomalyLogin'
| summarize Count = count() by LoginCountry
content.title: Anomalous Login Locations - World Map

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'GeoAnomalyLogin'
| summarize
 Events = count(),
 CountryMismatches= countif(LoginCountry != AssignedCountry),
 CityMismatches = countif(LoginCity != AssignedCity),
 LoginCountries = make_set(LoginCountry),
 IPAddresses = make_set(IpAddress),
 LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
 by UserId, AssignedCountry, AssignedCity
| order by Events desc
content.title: Geo Mismatch Details per User

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'GeoAnomalyLogin'
| extend CountryMismatch = LoginCountry != AssignedCountry
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, DeviceId, LoginCountry, LoginCity, AssignedCountry, AssignedCity, CountryMismatch, IpAddress, RawEventId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent Geo Anomaly Events (last 100)

content.json:
---
## Brute Force / Password Attack

**Rule:** `PasswordBruteForce` | **Severity:** High | **Schedule:** every 15 min, lookback 5 h

Detects `MultiFailLogin` events with `PassedAttempts >= 9`. Account blocking is applied automatically.

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'MultiFailLogin'
| summarize
 Events = count(),
 MaxAttempts = max(PassedAttempts)
 by bin(TimeGenerated, 30m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Brute Force Events Timeline (30 min bins)

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'MultiFailLogin'
| summarize
 AttackCount = count(),
 MaxAttempts = max(PassedAttempts),
 TotalAttempts = sum(PassedAttempts),
 MaxBlockSec = max(LoginBlockingSeconds),
 TotalBlockMin = sum(LoginBlockingSeconds) / 60,
 AffectedDevices = make_set(DeviceId),
 LastAttack = max(TimeGenerated)
 by UserId
| extend MaxBlockMin = round(toreal(MaxBlockSec) / 60.0, 1)
| order by MaxAttempts desc
content.title: Brute Force - Target Accounts

content.query:
StealthTalkAnomalousAuth_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{UserId}') or UserId == '{UserId}'
| where EventType == 'MultiFailLogin'
| project
 TimeGenerated,
 UserId,
 DeviceId,
 PassedAttempts,
 BlockMinutes = LoginBlockingSeconds / 60,
 AppVersion,
 RawEventId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent Brute Force Events (last 50)
